description: Dark-adaptation diagram: left, a labeled human-eye icon with two mechanism callout stubs (ACCOMMODATION = lens near/far focus, ADAPTATION = retinal brightness sensitivity); right, a line graph of VISUAL SENSITIVITY vs TIME IN DARK (0,5,15,30 min) plotting the classic dark-adaptation curve (steep early rise, then flattening) with a dashed FULL SENSITIVITY asymptote and a ~30-min vertical guide. Curve draws on left-to-right.
